sales.title: Ira & Larry Goldberg Coins & Collectibles - Auction 150, Lot 611 — Valens, AD 364-378. Gold Solidus (4.37g) 20 mm. Struck at Milan mint.  Diad. hd. of the emperor facing r. Reverse: Emperor standing r. holding long Chi-Ro staff and Victory on globe. NGC graded Ch. VF
sales.description:
Valens, AD 364-378. Gold Solidus (4.37g) 20 mm. Struck at Milan mint.  Diad. hd. of the emperor facing r. Reverse: Emperor standing r. holding long Chi-Ro staff and Victory on globe. NGC graded Ch. VF, Strike: 5/5, Surface: 3/5 clipped. Some faint graffito on reverse.  Estimated Value $400 - UP
Ex The Peter Preovolos Collection....
